transcript: For me, my freedom is very important. And then my boyfriend told me, ex-boyfriend told me, then Arushi, you are beautiful, you are intelligent, but I cannot let you work anymore. This cannot be done. You have to take permissions for this, permissions for that. I'll provide you with all the luxuries of your life. Now you have to do what I want you to do. I said wait, wait. This is not the life which is given to me. I have to build my own life. So I stepped from that relationship and I asked my best friend Akanksha.
